title: Top Order Per Day
description: Retrieve the highest order amount for each day.
sql_solution: SELECT date, amount FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY date ORDER BY amount DESC) rn FROM orders) WHERE rn = 1;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

ranking_window = Window.partitionBy("date").orderBy(col("amount").desc())

result = (
    orders.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(ranking_window))
    .filter(col("rn") == 1)
    .select("date", "amount")
)
